Category.title: Category
Category.description: Defines a classification for financial transactions, such as an expense or income type, used for budgeting and tracking across the startup.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the financial category (e.g., 'Marketing Expenses', 'Salaries', 'Subscription Revenue').

description.description: A detailed description of what this category encompasses, providing clarity for financial reporting.

type.description: Indicates whether the category is for 'expense' or 'income', helping in financial categorization.

Budget.title: Budget
Budget.description: Represents a monthly budget target set by the startup personnel for various expense categories.

id.description: The month ID in YYYY-MM format.

month.description: The specific month for this budget (YYYY-MM).

definition.description: Stores monthly budget targets for expense categories.
